# Image View

The `Dali::Ui::ImageView` control is a `dali-ui` application layer object model that displays images from various sources. It offers extensive control over image loading, display, and manipulation, ensuring efficient and customizable image presentation within your `dali-ui` applications.

## Table of Contents

*   [Creating an ImageView](#creating-an-imageview)
*   [Loading and Displaying Images](#loading-and-displaying-images)
*   [Image Sizing and Fitting](#image-sizing-and-fitting)
*   [Image Masking](#image-masking)
*   [N-Patch Images](#n-patch-images)
*   [Image Loading and Performance Policies](#image-loading-and-performance-policies)
*   [Image Colorization](#image-colorization)
*   [Retrieving Image Information](#retrieving-image-information)

## Creating an ImageView

You can create an `ImageView` instance using its default constructor or the `New()` static method. Both methods provide a handle to a newly created `ImageView`.
